subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'r-Rahim! Bear thou witness unto that whereunto God Himself hath testified, that verily there is no God but Him, the Single, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الرحیم اشهد بما شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
